matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > MealPlan_Version 5 > Child > Day 1 > Breakfast > Smoothie — Smoky Variation

node.name: Smoothie — Smoky Variation
node.short_description: Creamy banana peanut butter oat smoothie; a protein- and fiber-rich option with potential smoky flavor tweaks.
node.meal_suggestion: Serving idea: enjoy as a balanced breakfast or post-workout snack. To adjust macros, use dairy-free milk or lower-fat milk; to boost protein, add Greek yogurt or a protein powder; to introduce a smoky note, blend in a pinch of smoked paprika or a dash of cinnamon.
node.nutrition_note: Creamy smoothie built from banana, milk, peanut butter and oats. Rich in protein from peanut butter and milk, with fiber from banana and oats, and healthy fats from peanut butter. Calorie content varies by milk type and portion, but a typical 12–16 oz serving is about 400–480 kcal with roughly 14–22 g protein, 40–60 g carbohydrates and 12–20 g fat.

context_trace.description: Matched agg_exists(Meal[atom(content =~ "peanut")]) OR agg_exists(Meal[atom(content =~ "peanut")]) OR agg_exists(Meal[atom(content =~ "peanut")]) on Day 1 (Score: 0.99)
Matched atom(content =~ "peanut") on Smoothie — Smoky Variation (Score: 0.99)

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > MealPlan_Version 5 > Child > Day 2 > Breakfast > Smoothie — Lemon-Herb Style

node.name: Smoothie — Lemon-Herb Style
node.short_description: Creamy banana-milk smoothie with peanut butter and oats; balanced protein, carbs, and fats with fiber.
node.meal_suggestion: Creamy, protein-forward smoothie great for breakfast or post-workout. For a lemon-herb twist, blend in lemon zest and a few fresh herbs (mint or basil) with the listed ingredients.
node.nutrition_note: Approx. 550–600 kcal per serving. Protein ~22–28 g; carbs ~60–70 g; fat ~22–28 g. Rich in potassium (banana), calcium/vitamin D (milk), and fiber (oats). Note: the lemon-herb flavor is not represented by the current ingredients; to add lemon/herb notes, blend in lemon zest and fresh herbs (e.g., mint or basil) — this will adjust macros slightly.

context_trace.description: Matched agg_exists(Meal[atom(content =~ "peanut")]) OR agg_exists(Meal[atom(content =~ "peanut")]) OR agg_exists(Meal[atom(content =~ "peanut")]) on Day 2 (Score: 0.96)

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > MealPlan_Version 5 > Child > Day 5 > Breakfast > Smoothie — Berry Boost Skillet

node.name: Smoothie — Berry Boost Skillet
node.short_description: Creamy banana-peanut butter oat smoothie with balanced carbs, protein, and fats.
node.meal_suggestion: Blend banana, milk, peanut butter, and oats until smooth for a creamy drink; add ice for a cooler consistency. Optional toppings: sliced banana, berries, or a sprinkle of extra oats.
node.nutrition_note: Protein- and fiber-rich smoothie from banana, oats, peanut butter, and milk; provides potassium and healthy fats. Use unsweetened milk to limit sugar, and add berries for extra antioxidants if desired.

context_trace.description: Matched agg_exists(Meal[atom(content =~ "peanut")]) OR agg_exists(Meal[atom(content =~ "peanut")]) OR agg_exists(Meal[atom(content =~ "peanut")]) on Day 5 (Score: 0.91)
